sources.note: Searched job-postings sites (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby via Google) specifically for embedded/firmware/embedded-Linux/RTOS/avionics engineer postings with published pay ranges at companies other than Anduril, at Mid and Senior/Staff seniority. Cross-checked the existing regex-extraction corpus first (docs/research/job-postings-corpus/comp-extraction/embedded-iot-engineer.json) and found it already had non-Anduril data for Verkada (4 postings, $180K-$300K) and Carbon Robotics (1 posting, $190K-$225K) that were correctly excluded from the prior pass because those postings are is_ote:true (on-targe
